examples: It 'shows a thousandfold selectivity for fluoride over other common anions.
The water is treated, purified and sold to us, often at a thousandfold increase in price.
He suffers a thousandfold more from his so-called freedom than from his imprisonment in natural existence.
Data traffic on the Internet continues to grow tenfold every year and takes a thousandfold leap every three years.
Hard-drive capacity has increased a thousandfold in the past decade.
